entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Practices aimed at increasing water availability, reducing runoff, and improving soil nutrients to increase crop yield

entities.name: EROSION CONTROL
entities.description: A specific soil and water conservation practice to prevent soil loss

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY MEASURES
entities.description: A specific soil and water conservation practice to improve soil nutrient content

entities.name: SOUTHERN MALI
entities.description: The semiarid region where the research on rainfed agriculture was conducted

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available in the subsurface for crop use

entities.name: FARM WATER RUNOFF
entities.description: Water that flows over the land surface, contributing to soil erosion

entities.name: GULLY FORMATION
entities.description: The creation of deep channels in the soil caused by water runoff

entities.name: NUTRIENT CONTENT
entities.description: The level of essential nutrients present in the soil

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: WATERSHED APPROACH
entities.description: An integrated management strategy for rainfed agriculture involving community participation and monitoring

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural production that relies solely on rainfall for water

entities.name: COMMUNITY PARTICIPATION
entities.description: The involvement of local communities in establishing and monitoring research stations

entities.name: HYDRO-METEOROLOGICAL MONITORING
entities.description: The use of stations to monitor weather and water dynamics

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Controlled research tests conducted in the field to evaluate practices

entities.name: CONSUMPTIVE WATER USE
entities.description: The total amount of water used by crops and vegetation through evapotranspiration

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop grown in the semiarid region of southern Mali

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A fiber crop grown in the semiarid region of southern Mali

entities.name: NATURAL VEGETATION
entities.description: The native plant life of the southern Mali region

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Practices used to maintain or improve the nutrient levels of the soil

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The water content held in the soil
